title: Luziola fluitans
taxonomy: Luziola fluitans is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Luziola, which consists of several species of aquatic plants. Luziola fluitans is typically found in freshwater environments, such as rivers and lakes. The classification of Luziola fluitans includes it being a monocot, with a specific classification of Poales order and a more specific classification of Poaceae family. Luziola fluitans is further classified as a member of the genus Luziola, specifically under the subfamily Ehrhartoideae.
